description: Phantom recording spans (ADR 01079): a headless context skips the recording itself, but an aboveVariation record still runs checkpoint comparisons against committed baselines and reports staleness on stopRecord. This spec uses a recording path that is never recorded headed, so no baselines ever exist and the span deterministically reports stale (WARNING, outputs.stale true) on every run — proving headless staleness detection end-to-end. Windows/mac only: on Linux fixture jobs an Xvfb display can make headless ffmpeg recording real instead of skipped.

steps.description: Assert the phantom span flagged the never-recorded video as stale.
